details.test: Task 1: Save three high-paying remote/hybrid Software Engineer jobs in New York
Task 2: Create candidate profile and set a weekly Product Manager job alert in San Francisco
Task 3: Compare two jobs and apply to the better-paying one
Task 4: Post a detailed Senior UX Designer job as a recruiter
Task 5: Shortlist two top-rated Data Scientist candidates in Boston
Task 6: Save two mid-range jobs at highly-rated companies
Task 7: Clean up saved jobs by keeping only high-salary roles in New York or San Francisco
Task 8: Schedule two interviews for a shortlisted candidate on different days
